section.heading: Cooperative agreements with State

content.p: In administering the national river, the Secretary is authorized to enter into cooperative agreements with the State of West Virginia, or any political subdivision thereof, for the rendering, on a reimbursable or non-reimbursable basis, of rescue, fire fighting, and law enforcement services and cooperative assistance by nearby law enforcement and fire preventive agencies.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–625, title XI, § 1113, as added Pub. L. 100–534, title I, § 102, Oct. 26, 1988, 102 Stat. 2700.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 460m–26 of this title.
